title: SVD, PCA, t-SNE, UMAP + DSA Math & Geometry finish
focus: Workhorse decomposition, dimensionality reduction, when to read which plot.

items.label: Multiply Strings
interviewQuestions: Where does integer overflow / negative input / zero hide here, and how do you guard against it?
Can you derive a closed-form solution, and how does it compare to the iterative one?
Walk through edge cases: 0, 1, max int, min int, negative input.

items.label: Detect Squares
interviewQuestions: Where does integer overflow / negative input / zero hide here, and how do you guard against it?
Can you derive a closed-form solution, and how does it compare to the iterative one?
Walk through edge cases: 0, 1, max int, min int, negative input.

items.label: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD)
interviewQuestions: Why does SVD always exist while eigendecomposition does not?
Where is SVD used in recommender systems and embeddings?

items.label: PCA: derivation, variance retention, when it fails
interviewQuestions: Derive PCA as maximizing variance OR minimizing reconstruction error — they give the same answer. Why?
When does PCA fail (non-Gaussian, non-linear, scale-sensitive)?
Compare PCA vs t-SNE vs UMAP — when do you pick each?

items.label: t-SNE, UMAP — strengths and how to read the plots
interviewQuestions: Why are distances in a t-SNE plot misleading?
When would you choose UMAP over t-SNE?
